[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000010 1
1 110010000 3
2 100010000 2
3 011000100 3
4 000110110 4
5 011000010 3
6 011011101 6
7 001001010 3

12 21 000000100 1
23 32 000000100 1
34 43 000000010 1 match 0
45 54 011000000 2
56 65 001001000 2
67 76 001001010 3 match 7
70 07 001001000 2

02 20 011000000 2
13 31 000010110 3
24 42 011000000 2
35 53 000010100 2
46 64 001000010 2
57 75 001001101 4
60 06 001001000 2
71 17 000001111 4

14 41 000000010 1 match 0
25 52 011000100 3 match 3
36 63 000000010 1 match 0
47 74 001000010 2
50 05 011011000 4
61 16 000001010 2
72 27 001000100 2

26 62 001000000 1
37 73 000000110 2
